actions.value:
It seems that you have stumbled upon a Polygon network fee estimation bug that just recently surfaced. We already have a developer working on it, and we expect the fix will be in the next update of the app.
 
In a nutshell, the app is currently estimating Polygon fees at ~10% of what they should be, so broadcasted transactions get stuck pending and will not get confirmed on-chain.
 
Meanwhile, the workaround is to simply adjust the fee when doing a send of POL or any tokens on the Polygon network. After setting up your Send transaction, tap on the Fee and select the Custom Fee option. There, you may input these numbers to successfully broadcast a transaction to the Polygon network -
Gas Limit: 21000
Gas Price (Gwei): 35
 
Let us know if you need any assistance with this, or if you have any other questions or concerns.
